
<style>
.msg { padding:10px; margin:10px 0; border-radius:8px; }
.msg.human { background: #2a2a2a; border: 1px solid #555; }
.msg.ai    { background: #262b36; border: 1px solid #445; }
.msg.tool  { background: #2e3330; border: 1px solid #474; }
summary { cursor:pointer; }
</style>
<details class="msg human">
<summary><strong>Human</strong></summary>

**Images**
<img alt="image" src="data:image/png;base64," />

**Content**
\[HUMAN\] Pick the blue circular object

</details>

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
\[REASONING\_NOTE\] Looking at the scene, I need to first identify the blue circular object. I can see several objects but I should get closer to have a better view and confirm which one matches the description. I'll walk closer to get a better view of the objects on the surface.

**Tool calls**
- **Tool call:** `Walk`

```json
{
  "x": 0.0,
  "y": 1.0,
  "z": -1.0
}
```


<details>
<summary>📊 <strong>Instrumentations</strong></summary>

- **Generation timing (ms):** `{'start': 1762366370645, 'end': 1762366380134, 'elapsed': 9489}`
- **Tool timings (aggregate, ms):** `{'elapsed_sum': 1386.0}`
- **Tool timings (per call, ms):**
  - `Walk` → `{'t0': 116279503, 't1': 116280889, 'elapsed': 1386}`
- **Token usage:** prompt=6422, completion=153, total=6575
</details>

</details>

<details class="msg tool">
<summary><strong>Tool Response: Walk</strong></summary>

**Content**
Target position reached at \(x=0.6, y=0.08, z=\-1\)

</details>

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
\[REASONING\_NOTE\] Now I'll look at the objects to identify the blue circular one.

**Tool calls**
- **Tool call:** `Look`

```json
{
  "x": 0,
  "y": 0.9,
  "z": -1
}
```


<details>
<summary>📊 <strong>Instrumentations</strong></summary>

- **Generation timing (ms):** `{'start': 1762366381524, 'end': 1762366387999, 'elapsed': 6475}`
- **Tool timings (aggregate, ms):** `{'elapsed_sum': 1521.0}`
- **Tool timings (per call, ms):**
  - `Look` → `{'t0': 116287368, 't1': 116288889, 'elapsed': 1521}`
- **Token usage:** prompt=6598, completion=110, total=6708
</details>

</details>

<details class="msg tool">
<summary><strong>Tool Response: Look</strong></summary>

**Content**
Look complete. An augmented image will be returned in the next user message labeled \[VISUAL\_PERCEPTION\]. The \[symbolic perception\]\(\#symbolic\-perception\) has been updated

</details>

<details class="msg human">
<summary><strong>Human</strong></summary>

**Images**
<img alt="image" src="data:image/png;base64," />

**Content**
\[VISUAL\_PERCEPTION\]

</details>

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
\[REASONING\_NOTE\] From the updated view, I can now see a blue circular plate labeled as "Plate\_57". This matches the description of being both blue and circular. I will now proceed to pick up this object.

**Tool calls**
- **Tool call:** `PickObject`

```json
{
  "ObjTag": "Plate_57"
}
```


<details>
<summary>📊 <strong>Instrumentations</strong></summary>

- **Generation timing (ms):** `{'start': 1762366389524, 'end': 1762366399778, 'elapsed': 10254}`
- **Tool timings (aggregate, ms):** `{'elapsed_sum': 825.0}`
- **Tool timings (per call, ms):**
  - `PickObject` → `{'t0': 116299146, 't1': 116299971, 'elapsed': 825}`
- **Token usage:** prompt=8255, completion=107, total=8362
</details>

</details>

<details class="msg tool">
<summary><strong>Tool Response: PickObject</strong></summary>

**Content**
Successfully picked object Plate\_57

</details>

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
I have successfully picked up the blue circular plate as requested.
